response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep open-source involvement, Linux experience, and a completed CS degree, but he falls short on two core requirements: German proficiency is listed as Basic while the role mandates minimum C1 for a client-facing German consulting position, and he has no demonstrated track record of formal team leadership or technical project management at the head-of-development level. His founder experience and mentoring workshops show initiative but do not substitute for proven operational leadership of client projects.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend services
Strong open-source commitment (GISCollective founder, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker) aligned with digital sovereignty focus
Solid Linux/DevOps background including Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, and infrastructure setup
concerns: German language level (Basic) is far below the required C1 minimum for advising German-speaking clients
No formal leadership, tech lead, or people-management roles despite ~18 years of experience
No evidence of UML/formal modeling, requirements management, or Python proficiency listed in desired skills
